vocabulary.definition: The latest time by which something should be completed
vocabulary.example: We need to meet the project deadline by Friday.

vocabulary.definition: A person with an interest or concern in a business
vocabulary.example: We need to consult all stakeholders before making this decision.

vocabulary.definition: A document that allows a passenger to board an aircraft
vocabulary.example: Please have your boarding pass ready for inspection.

vocabulary.definition: A doctor's written direction for medicine
vocabulary.example: The doctor gave me a prescription for antibiotics.

vocabulary.definition: To use something to maximum advantage
vocabulary.example: We should leverage our existing customer relationships.
